headline: Delta-1 Gold Project Awarded $200,000 Funding Under the Ontario Junior Exploration Program
summary: Toronto, Ontario--(Newsfile Corp. - March 30, 2026) - Delta Resources Limited (TSXV: DLTA) (OTC Pink: DTARF) (FSE: 6GO1) ("Delta" or "the Company") is pleased to announce that it has been awarded $200,000 in non-dilutive funding under the Ontario Junior Exploration Program ("OJEP") to advance exploration at its Delta-1 Gold Project near Thunder Bay, Ontario.This marks the fourth consecutive year of OJEP funding for Delta, reinforcing the Company's consistent exploration results and the...
